# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User prefers no glassmorphism/glow effects (no backdrop-filter blur, no accent-colored box-shadow glows, no neon effects, no shimmer animations) on the Nightglass theme navbar. Prefers clean solid backgrounds with subtle animations like sliding indicators, staggered entrances, and interactive micro-animations.
- Everything under the demo/ folder is just for demo purposes — it's not real Domoticz or the theme. The main theme files are custom.css and custom.js in the repository root.
